project_type: Full-stack SaaS PWA - Python FastAPI backend + React TypeScript frontend
test_framework: No test files found - validation via TypeScript compilation and linting
build_command: cd frontend && npm install && npm run build
verification_instructions: 1. Backend: check Python syntax with python -m py_compile. 2. Frontend: run tsc --noEmit to check TypeScript types. 3. Verify all new files exist with correct content.
setup_instructions: Backend: pip install -r requirements.txt. Frontend: npm install
environment_constraints: OPEN_INTERNET - full access. Python 3.11, Node 22 available. No Supabase instance for live testing - validate via static analysis.
contribution_requirements: Vietnamese UI text with diacritics. Follow existing patterns: Pydantic models, FastAPI routers with Depends, Supabase client for DB, axios API client on frontend, TanStack Query for data fetching.
key_patterns: Backend: routers/ define endpoints with Depends(require_roles/get_current_user), services/ contain business logic using get_supabase(), models/ have Pydantic schemas. Frontend: api/ has typed functions using apiClient (axios), types/ has TypeScript interfaces, pages/ have React components using useQuery/useMutation. File upload pattern: see renter_service.upload_id_photo and frontend uploadIdFront for the established pattern.
directory_structure: backend/app/routers/ - API route handlers, backend/app/models/ - Pydantic models, backend/app/services/ - Business logic, backend/migrations/ - SQL files, frontend/src/pages/ - Route page components, frontend/src/types/ - TypeScript types, frontend/src/api/ - API client functions
